query: echo "===NANOBOT_ENV==="; cat ~/.hermes-nanobot/.env 2>/dev/null; echo "===NANOBOT_DIR==="; ls -la ~/.hermes-nanobot/ 2>/dev/null; echo "===NANOBOT_GW==="; cat ~/.hermes-nanobot/gateway.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo "===HERMES_BIN==="; which hermes 2>/dev/null; hermes --help 2>/dev/null | head -20
